description_long: This object is a modern mobile phone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The device features a prominent black screen that covers most of the front surface, likely made of glass, and a vibrant pink metallic or plastic frame that wraps around the edges. The bottom edge includes a charging port, a headphone jack, and speaker/microphone grilles, while the sides display physical buttons for volume and power control. The back and top surfaces are not fully visible, but the design suggests a minimalist aesthetic with no visible external case or cover. The phone's compact size and lightweight construction make it suitable for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, pink-framed mobile phone with a large black screen, visible ports, and side buttons, designed for handheld use.
description_view_0: The bottom edge shows a charging port, headphone jack, and speaker/microphone grilles set in a pink frame.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the slim profile and reveals two physical buttons, likely for volume and power.
description_view_2: The top edge is plain with no visible ports or buttons, emphasizing the phone's minimalist design.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows a continuous pink frame with no visible buttons or features.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is blank and turned off, with no visible content, icons, or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: No visible camera modules or lenses are present on any side of the device.
attribute_button_layout: Two physical buttons are visible on the right edge, likely serving as volume and power controls; no other buttons are present.
